title: Iran conditions peace — CNBC: Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets Hormuz timeline
snippet: CNBC analysis: Iran demands end of hostilities in Lebanon and halt of US blockade before any deal. Every Lebanon ceasefire collapse resets the diplomatic timeline for the US-Iran agreement, which delays Hormuz reopening. Iran formally links all three theaters.
tag_reason: Supplements src-1657 with CNBC analysis on specific mechanism — Lebanon ceasefire collapse resetting Hormuz timeline; adds analytical depth to the three-theater linkage
